debug_info.goal:
ι : Type
oSpec : OracleSpec ι
StmtIn StmtOut WitIn WitOut : Type
n : ℕ
pSpec : ProtocolSpec n
i : Fin (n + 1)
stmt : StmtIn
wit : WitIn
prover : Prover oSpec StmtIn WitIn StmtOut WitOut pSpec
⊢ Prod.fst <$>
      ((simulateQ loggingOracle).toFun (Transcript i pSpec × prover.PrvState i)
          (Fin.induction (pure (default, prover.input (stmt, wit)))
            (fun j => @Prover.processRound ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut WitIn WitOut n pSpec j prover) i)).run =
    Fin.induction (pure (default, prover.input (stmt, wit)))
      (fun j => @Prover.processRound ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut WitIn WitOut n pSpec j prover) i

failed_attempts:
induction oa using OracleComp.induction with
  | pure => simp
  | failure => simp
  | query_bind i t oa ih => simp [simulateQ_bind, ih]

have h {α} (oa : OracleComp _ α) : Prod.fst <$> (simulateQ loggingOracle oa).run = oa := by
    induction oa using OracleComp.induction <;> simp [simulateQ_bind, *]
  exact h _

have h {α} (oa : OracleComp _ α) :
      Prod.fst <$> (simulateQ loggingOracle oa).run = oa := by
    induction oa using OracleComp.induction with
    | pure a => simp
    | query_bind i t oa ih => simp [simulateQ_bind, ih]
    | failure => simp
  apply h

have h {α : Type} (oa : OracleComp _ α) :
      Prod.fst <$> (simulateQ loggingOracle oa).run = oa := by
    induction oa using OracleComp.induction with
    | pure x => simp
    | query_bind i t oa ih => simp [simulateQ_bind, ih]
    | failure => simp
  apply h

have h {α} (oa : OracleComp (oSpec + (challengeOracleInterface pSpec).spec) α) :
      Prod.fst <$> (simulateQ loggingOracle oa).run = oa := by
    induction oa using OracleComp.induction with
    | pure a => simp
    | failure => simp
    | query_bind i t oa ih => simp [simulateQ_bind, ih]
  apply h
